sources.name: Wikipedia - David Tipper
sources.snippet: Underground electronic music producer with no RIAA certifications on record. Albums include Surrounded (2003), Jettison Mind Hatch (2019), and others.

sources.name: RIAA Database
sources.snippet: No RIAA certifications found for Tipper.

sources.name: Wikipedia - U (Tourist album)
sources.snippet: U (2016) reached top 40 in Australia. Everyday (2019) is the follow-up album. No RIAA certifications found.

sources.name: RIAA Database

sources.name: RIAA Database
sources.snippet: TOVE LO - QUEEN OF THE CLOUDS: Platinum certified February 26, 2016. Singles: Habits (Stay High) 5x Platinum, Talking Body 2x Platinum, Cool Girl certified.

sources.name: Headline Planet
sources.snippet: Tove Lo's Queen Of The Clouds, which has produced a 5x platinum single in Habits (Stay High) and a 2x platinum single in Talking Body, is now a platinum album.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Tove Lo discography
sources.snippet: Queen of the Clouds peaked at number 14 on US Billboard 200 and received platinum certification in both Sweden and US.

sources.snippet: Weval has released their third album Remember in 2023, after previous records The Weight (2019) and the self-titled album Weval (2016).

sources.name: RIAA Database
sources.snippet: THE XX - XX album: Gold certified March 3, 2021. Intro single also certified.

sources.name: BestSellingAlbums.org
sources.snippet: THE XX sold over 1,930,000 albums. Best-selling album is xx with 1,375,000 copies. xx certified Gold in US (500,000).

sources.name: Wikipedia - Coexist
sources.snippet: Coexist certified platinum in UK, gold in multiple countries.

sources.snippet: I See You certified Gold in UK (100,000 units).

riaaCertifications.album: More Songs About Buildings and Food

sources.name: RIAA Database via Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Studio albums with RIAA certifications: Stop Making Sense 2x Platinum, Little Creatures 2x Platinum, Speaking in Tongues Platinum, Fear of Music Gold, Remain in Light Gold, True Stories Gold, More Songs About Buildings and Food Gold, Naked Gold.

sources.name: BestSellingAlbums.org
sources.snippet: TALKING HEADS sold over 9,212,500 albums, including 7,500,000 in the United States. Best-selling album is STOP MAKING SENSE with 2,365,000 copies.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Remain in Light
sources.snippet: Remain in Light was certified gold by RIAA in September 1985 after shipping 500,000 copies.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Stop Making Sense
sources.snippet: Stop Making Sense certified 2x Platinum by RIAA (2,000,000 units). Gold certified March 1, 1985. Platinum July 2, 1986. Double Platinum August 17, 1994.
